title: ennealophus simplex
intro: Ennealophus simplex, also known as the mountain forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand and Australia. It is used in traditional herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, respiratory issues, and as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce pain and swelling. Ennealophus simplex can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for a range of applications in natural health remedies.
